heroText: Connect with 50+ companies and discover opportunities that match your skills, passion, and career aspirations.
featuresText: Our platform combines cutting-edge technology with human expertise to deliver exceptional results
jobsText: Discover your next career move with our curated selection of featured jobs
ctaText: Join millions of professionals who have found their dream jobs through wijha. Your next opportunity is just a click away.
employersSubtitle: Join professionals working at leading Algerian companies
feature1Desc: Advanced AI analyzes your profile to deliver personalized job recommendations that align with your career goals.
feature2Desc: One-click apply feature lets you submit applications instantly with your saved profile and resume.
feature3Desc: Access free courses, certifications, and resources to enhance your skills and stand out to employers.
feature4Desc: Your data is encrypted and secure. Control who sees your profile and applications with privacy settings.
